name: FARM-pool (incentive-heavy, small)
recommendations: High compression: the APR compresses by ~21.60pp to ~18.40% after the TVL change. Size in carefully and re-check the realised yield.
Incentive-dominated: ~90.0% of the APR is dilutable incentive flow. Expect this part to fall as TVL rises or incentives wind down.
Large self-dilution: your own deposit alone cuts the APR by ~12.00pp. You are crowding the very yield you are chasing; size down or split entry.
High external-inflow risk: projected outside capital adds ~9.60pp of further dilution. The realised APR depends heavily on how much others pile in.

name: FARM-pool (incentive-heavy, small)

High external-inflow risk: projected outside capital adds ~9.60pp of further dilution. The realised APR depends heavily on how much others pile in.

name: stETH (base-heavy, deep)
recommendations: Sticky yield: APR barely moves (~0.00pp) to ~4.00% even as TVL grows. The yield resists dilution well.
Sticky base: a large share of the APR is base (non-incentive) yield that does not dilute with TVL. This part is more durable.
